Container.Name: t1d-pipeline
Container.Overview: Streamlit UI + ML pipeline for predicting glucose from Dexcom G7 CGM and Tandem Mobi pump data. See docs/ML_PRIMER.md for non-ML readers.
Container.Description: Local-only T1D glucose prediction pipeline. Ingests Dexcom Clarity CSVs and Tandem Mobi pump events, builds a unified 5-min timeline, trains an XGBoost 30-min forecast model, and exposes everything through a Streamlit UI. Health data stays on the bind-mounted appdata volume — never leaves your server.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for raw CSVs, processed parquets, and the trained model.

Config.Name: TCONNECT_EMAIL
Config.Description: Tandem t:connect login email. Leave blank to force synthetic pump data.

Config.Name: TCONNECT_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Tandem t:connect password. Leave blank to force synthetic pump data.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone (e.g. America/New_York). Used for display only — all storage is UTC.
